recommendations.title: The Nice Guys
recommendations.overview: A private eye investigates the apparent suicide of a fading porn star in 1970s Los Angeles and uncovers a conspiracy.

recommendations.title: È nata una star?
recommendations.overview: Marco, a shy teenager, learns that he has... what it takes to be a great porn star, but he doesn't know how to tell his parents. Hell breaks loose when a neighbor finds a porn video of him and leaves it in his parents' mailbox.

recommendations.title: Johnson Family Vacation
recommendations.overview: Nate Johnson, a Los Angeles man estranged from his wife and three children, decides to reconnect with his family by taking them with him on a road trip to Missouri for a big family reunion.

recommendations.title: Red Rocket
recommendations.overview: After hitting rock bottom in Los Angeles, former porn star Mikey Saber returns to his hometown in Texas to stay with his estranged wife and mother-in-law. Just as tensions begin to ease, he becomes infatuated with a young doughnut shop worker named S

recommendations.title: Imperial Dreams
recommendations.overview: A 21-year-old reformed gangster's devotion to his family and his future is put to the test when he is released from prison and returns to his old stomping grounds in Watts, Los Angeles.

recommendations.title: Detour
recommendations.overview: The life of Al Roberts, a pianist in a New York nightclub, turns into a nightmare when he decides to hitchhike to Los Angeles to visit his girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Joshua Tree
recommendations.overview: A Los Angeles police detective tracks a fugitive who heads for the desert with a deputy sheriff as hostage.

recommendations.title: The Girl King
recommendations.overview: A portrait of the brilliant, extravagant Kristina of Sweden, queen from age six, who fights the conservative forces that are against her ideas to modernize Sweden and who have no tolerance for her awakening sexuality.

recommendations.title: Raise Your Voice
recommendations.overview: A coming-of-age story centered around a small-town singer brokenhearted by the death of her brother in a car crash, who had secretly submitted her for a summer session at a performing arts academy in Los Angeles. In the academy, she experiences a who

recommendations.title: Hot Girls Wanted
recommendations.overview: A first-ever look at the realities of the professional “amateur” porn world and the steady stream of 18-to-19-year old girls entering into it.
